status.goal: Full song 2-3 min for streaming; 45-90s excerpt for vertical edit

fields.title: Crack Dip Glow
fields.styleOfMusic: K-pop electronic pop with crisp four-on-the-floor kicks, rubbery synth bass, playful staccato percussion, bright glossy chorus, sensual late-night neon sheen, tiny glitch fills before each drop, sparkling bell swells, close-mic lead vocals, punchy clean mix, food-video ASMR energy., k-pop, pop, electronic
fields.excludeStyles: No aggressive rap, no metal, no heavy rock, no children's choir, no advertising-style spoken voice, no voice-over narration, no real artist reference, no brand names, no recipe tutorial lyrics, no ingredient counting, no explicit sexual lyrics, no instructional cooking steps.
fields.autoLyricsPrompt:
Write original English song lyrics inspired by a joyful unicorn kitchen mascot making inside-out crispy rice paper rolls. Use only lyrics and section tags; do not explain the prompt. Do not include genre, production, instrument, mix, or vocal-style instructions. Do not write a recipe tutorial, quantities, numbered steps, brand names, software names, or social media references. Keep the sensuality food-centered: glossy sauce, crackle, color, heat, freshness, desire for the bite; no explicit body or sexual content.

Mood: playful, glossy, sexy food-video energy, fresh, crunchy, bright, late-night snack magic.

Lyric style: short singable lines, clipped phrasing, catchy repetitions, call-and-response energy, simple hook phrases, strong chorus that survives a 45-90 second edit.

Story and imagery to weave in naturally:
- rice paper turning satin soft
- cold jasmine rice like pearls on the outside
- purple cabbage, carrot, cucumber, mint, cilantro
- savory tofu, sesame, ginger, garlic
- skillet sizzle, golden blisters, crisp crack
- peanut lime sauce, glossy tan ribbon, one slow drip
- cut-open rainbow layers and a satisfied unicorn in the kitchen

Must include naturally: crack, dip, glow, rice paper, peanut lime, golden, mint, sizzle, unicorn.

Structure:
[Verse 1]
Satin wrapper, pearl rice, rainbow crunch, quiet anticipation.

[Pre-Chorus]
Heat rises, pan sings, the roll starts to glow.

[Chorus]
Big chantable hook around crack / dip / glow, peanut lime, golden crisp, and the unicorn wanting one more bite.

[Verse 2]
Tofu, herbs, mint, cucumber snap, skillet blisters, sauce ribbon.

[Bridge]
Softer glossy moment: one slow drip, rainbow center, fresh cool crunch.

[Final Chorus]
Repeat the hook with extra energy and a final satisfied kitchen image.
fields.shortVersionPlan: Extract a 55-70 second edit: 2-bar intro under the opening crack-and-dip, Verse 1 images over wrapper/rice/filling prep, pre-chorus over skillet blistering, full chorus over sauce ribbon, cut-face reveal, dip drag, and final satisfied Licorn hero. The hook should land exactly on the crack / dip / glow moments.

instructions.voice: Close, playful, glossy pop lead; youthful energy without real-artist imitation.
instructions.structure: Full song should run 2-3 minutes with a reusable chorus; keep lines short and visual for vertical edits.
instructions.workflowNotes: Manual Suno workflow only. Do not generate music from this workspace. Keep lyric prompt separate from musical style.

qualityChecks: Title is first in markdown and fields.title matches it.
Style of Music contains only musical style and production references, not lyric instructions.
Auto Lyrics Prompt is in English, under 3000 characters, and avoids recipe tutorial wording.
No real artists, protected voices, brands, or explicit sexual lyrics are requested.
Short version plan aligns with Seedance hook, skillet, sauce, reveal, and final hero segments.
